overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a gothic cathedral interior transitioning to its exterior courtyard at night. The footage appears to be from a video game engine, showcasing detailed stone architecture, vaulted ceilings, and stained glass windows inside, followed by flying buttresses and a distant city skyline outside.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the interior of a grand gothic cathedral. Tall stone pillars line the central nave, supporting an intricately ribbed vaulted ceiling. At the far end, a massive circular rose window dominates the wall, flanked by tall stained glass panels. The space is empty and illuminated by warm artificial light mixed with cool ambient tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral exterior courtyard with view of night city skyline

events.description: dissolve transition from cathedral interior to exterior courtyard with night sky visible
lighting shifts from warm interior mixed lighting to cool dark night exterior

agents.ego_description: walking along the exterior wall of the cathedral, viewing the flying buttresses and distant city skyline

entered.detail: massive stone cathedral exterior with flying buttresses and ornate gothic details
stone architectural supports extending from the cathedral wall
dark blue night sky with atmospheric haze
silhouetted gothic towers and buildings in the distance
large stone tiles covering the courtyard ground

segments.scene_description: Following a dissolve transition, the scene shifts to the exterior of the cathedral at night. The camera walks along the massive stone wall with its flying buttresses, while the dark blue sky and distant silhouetted city skyline fill the right side of the frame. The ground is paved with large stone tiles, and the atmosphere is quiet and empty.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm, enclosed grandeur of a gothic cathedral interior to the cool, open expanse of its exterior courtyard at night. It begins by gliding through the central nave, passing tall stone pillars that support an intricately ribbed vaulted ceiling. As the camera approaches a massive circular rose window and flanking stained glass panels, the scene shifts from the interior's mixed artificial lighting to the dark blue atmosphere of the outdoors. The perspective then expands to follow the massive stone walls and flying buttresses, moving across paved stone tiles. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a distant silhouetted city skyline under a quiet night sky.
